record.field: <form string="Login As"><group><field name="group_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="company_id"/><field name="company_ids"/><field name="return_to"/><field name="allow_inactive"/><field name="allow_superuser"/></group><field name="group_ids"/><footer><button name="switch_to_user" type="object" string="Login As" class="btn-primary"/><button special="cancel" string="Cancel"/></footer></form>
